[{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/3140343201","pull_request_review_id":4173462517,"id":3140343201,"node_id":"PRRC_kwDOAhFMk867LdWh","diff_hunk":"@@ -138,6 +138,7 @@
       set -g base-index 1
       set-window-option -g mode-keys emacs
       unbind-key C-b
+      set-option -ga update-environment ' WAYLAND_DISPLAY'","path":"home/common.nix","commit_id":"3850f5c820b4d38c5d142ae380693568f2269284","original_commit_id":"3850f5c820b4d38c5d142ae380693568f2269284","user":{"login":"gemini-code-assist[bot]","id":176961590,"node_id":"BOT_kgDOCow4Ng","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/956858?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D","html_url":"https://github.com/apps/gemini-code-assist","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/gemini-code-assist%5Bbot%5D/received_events","type":"Bot","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

Since this configuration includes Hyprland (as seen in `home/hyprland.nix`) and utilizes scripts like `hypr-cheatsheet` which depend on `hyprctl`, it is recommended to also include `HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE` in the `update-environment` list. Without this, `hyprctl` may fail to connect to the compositor socket when run from within a tmux session attached from a new Hyprland instance. Additionally, adding `XDG_SESSION_TYPE` helps Wayland-aware applications correctly identify the session environment.

```
      set-option -ga update-environment ' WAYLAND_DISPLAY HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE XDG_SESSION_TYPE'
```","created_at":"2026-04-24T21:19:40Z","updated_at":"2026-04-24T21:19:40Z","html_url":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/508#discussion_r3140343201","pull_request_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/508","_links":{"self":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/3140343201"},"html":{"href":"https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/508#discussion_r3140343201"},"pull_request":{"href":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/508"}},"reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/patflynn/cosmo/pulls/comments/3140343201/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"start_line":null,"original_start_line":null,"start_side":null,"line":141,"original_line":141,"side":"RIGHT","author_association":"NONE","original_position":4,"position":4,"subject_type":"line"}]

Since this configuration includes Hyprland (as seen in `home/hyprland.nix`) and utilizes scripts like `hypr-cheatsheet` which depend on `hyprctl`, it is recommended to also include `HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE` in the `update-environment` list. input.command:
git add home/common.nix && git commit -m "tmux: also pass HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE and XDG_SESSION_TYPE

Ensures hyprctl and Wayland-aware tools work correctly in tmux sessions
attached from a new Hyprland instance." && git push

content.text: Addressed the single review comment by extending the tmux `update-environment` list with `HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE` and `XDG_SESSION_TYPE`. Pushed as commit `044f650` and replied to the comment.
